sections_cited: section 73 of the Sindh Cooperative Societies Act

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1494 of 2021 Const. Petition No.D-1742 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Present: Omar Sial and Jawad Akbar Sarwana, JJ Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For hearing of CMA 7222/2021. 2.For hearing of main case. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Domki, Advocate for petitioners in C.P.No.D-1742 of 2021 None present for petitioners in C.P.No.D-1494 of 2021 Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Shar, Advocate for respondents No.5&6 in C.P.No.D-1494 of 2021 Mr. Abdul Raheem Mahar, Advocate for respondent No.5 in C.P.No.D- 1442 of 2021. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General. Date of Hearing: 13-06-2023 Date of Decision: 19-06-2023 O R D E R OMAR SIAL, J.: Counsel has been unable to satisfy us as to how these petitions are maintainable nor as to why have petitioners not approached the Special Court for Co-operative Societies in pursuance of section 73 of the Sindh Cooperative Societies Act, 2020. Accordingly, these petitions are dismissed along with pending application(s). Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE
